hero.title:
The AI concierge
for your business
hero.subtitle: Automate customer replies, manage bookings and reviews — with the elegance Monaco deserves.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: One platform to manage the entire customer experience.

items.title: WhatsApp AI Assistant
items.desc: Automatic replies in French, English, and Russian. Your guests get an instant response, around the clock.

items.title: AI Google Reviews
items.desc: Personalised responses to every review, protecting and elevating your online reputation.

items.title: Smart Bookings
items.desc: WhatsApp-based reservations synced with Google Calendar. Automatic confirmations.

items.title: Smart Upsell
items.desc: Personalised post-visit follow-ups. Increase return visits and average spend.

how.title: How it works
how.subtitle: Three steps to transform your customer service.

steps.label: Connect your channels
steps.desc: WhatsApp, Instagram, Google Business — set up in minutes, no technical skills required.

steps.label: AI works for you
steps.desc: Natural multilingual replies, booking management, review monitoring — all on autopilot.

steps.label: You stay in control
steps.desc: Real-time dashboard, instant notifications, step in at any moment.
